hooks.command: "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR"/.claude/hooks/sync-to-platforms.sh && echo 'Multi-Agent Harness Pipeline active. Primary: Claude Code. Sync targets: Kiro, Antigravity. Run: bash scripts/orchestrate.sh "<task>" <module>'
echo 'Reminder: Adversarial review pipeline (Planner→Executor→Reviewer). Reviewer MUST NOT see Executor reasoning. Config: .mcp.json (primary) → .kiro/settings/mcp.json (sync)'

FILE=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [[ "$FILE" == .mcp.json ]] || [[ "$FILE" == .claude/settings* ]]; then "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR"/.claude/hooks/sync-to-platforms.sh; fi; if [[ "$FILE" == modules/* ]]; then echo "[Review needed] Module file edited: $FILE"; fi
INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE 'rm -rf /|drop table|DROP TABLE'; then echo "Blocked: dangerous command" >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0
